mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_RECEIVABLE (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_SALE_ID, S_CUSTOMER_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, I_RECEIVED_AMOUNT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sSaleId}, #{sCustomerId}, #{iTotalAmount}, #{iReceivedAmount}, #{iStatus}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_SALE_ID, S_CUSTOMER_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, I_RECEIVED_AMOUNT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_RECEIVABLE WHERE S_SALE_ID = #{saleId}

SELECT S_ID, S_SALE_ID, S_CUSTOMER_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, I_RECEIVED_AMOUNT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_RECEIVABLE
ORDER BY DT_CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT r.S_CUSTOMER_ID AS sCustomerId, c.S_NAME AS sCustomerName, SUM(r.I_TOTAL_AMOUNT) AS iTotalAmount, SUM(r.I_RECEIVED_AMOUNT) AS iReceivedAmount, SUM(r.I_TOTAL_AMOUNT - r.I_RECEIVED_AMOUNT) AS iUnreceivedAmount FROM TAB_RECEIVABLE r LEFT JOIN TAB_CUSTOMER c ON c.S_ID = r.S_CUSTOMER_ID GROUP BY r.S_CUSTOMER_ID, c.S_NAME ORDER BY iUnreceivedAmount DESC

SELECT S_ID, S_SALE_ID, S_CUSTOMER_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, I_RECEIVED_AMOUNT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_RECEIVABLE WHERE S_CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} ORDER BY DT_CREATE_TIME DESC
